items.speaker: Maqi
items.text: Drinks that will prevail on foreign taste buds... Maybe I should do a street interview with those visitors?

items.speaker: Maqi
items.text: The Pioneer Merchandises have been Ganxue's staple. Many visitors bring one of those back as a gift.

items.speaker: Maqi
items.text: That would be a good idea that you ask Ganxue about their comments on Jinzhou.
